reviews.comment:
A partir de las 23 un solo operario y tan solo dos darsenas para repostar combustible habilitadas. Con cuatro autos adelante 25 minutos de espera😌

(Translated by Google)
From 11 PM onwards, there's only one attendant and just two fuel bays open. With four cars ahead, there's a 25-minute wait. 😌
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhbXNfR1BnEAE

reviews.comment:
Ofrecen buen servicio pero todo es muy lento, se toman su tiempo solo para surtir combustible, puedes pasar un buen rato esperando y todo va a depender las ganas que tengan de trabajar

(Translated by Google)
They offer good service, but everything is very slow. They take their time just to pump fuel, you can spend a long time waiting, and it all depends on how motivated they are to work.
